creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233564
py-wagtail-switch-to-dj32-orig-ports.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that switches www/py-wagtail back to the origin Django ports that were recently assigned from Django 2.2 to Django 3.2.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.3-RELEASE amd64, py37, py38, py39)
